sections.title: Underlying Mechanism
sections.content: Piezoelectric transducers (Piezo A / Piezo B) in transit-time configuration alternately transmit and receive ultrasonic pulses through a fluid channel. The difference in transit time between upstream and downstream signal paths is proportional to fluid velocity. An embedded NTC thermistor provides simultaneous medium temperature. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

sections.title: Product Functional Promise
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Statement** | Measure volumetric flow rate and fluid temperature in closed-pipe liquid circuits without mechanical contact, pressure drop, or moving parts |
| **Verb** | Measure |
| **Object** | volumetric flow rate and fluid temperature |
| **Context** | in closed-pipe liquid circuits |
| **Scope** | product |

**Differentiators vs alternatives:**

| # | Differentiator | Vs What |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | No mechanical contact with the fluid stream | Turbine/impeller meters require rotating parts in the flow [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 2 | Zero pressure drop across the measurement point | Orifice-plate, venturi, and vortex meters obstruct flow [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 3 | No moving parts — eliminates mechanical wear and maintenance | Turbine meters require bearing replacement schedules [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 4 | Simultaneous flow + temperature in a single sensor body | Conventional setups require separate flow meter + temperature probe [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 5 | Bidirectional flow detection without additional hardware | Check valves or reverse-flow sensors needed with mechanical meters [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 6 | Tolerant of glycol mixtures and particulate suspensions | Turbine sensors degraded by particles; Coriolis meters unaffected but cost 5-10x more [SRC: 01_product_decomposition, EST] |

**Mechanism-Free Test:** The statement contains no technology-specific terms (no "ultrasonic," "piezoelectric," "transit-time"). The same statement would hold if the flow rate were measured by electromagnetic, Coriolis, or optical means — only the differentiators would change. PASS.

sections.title: UNSPSC Classification
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **UNSPSC Code** | 41112501 [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| **UNSPSC Title** | Flowmeters [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| **UNSPSC Path** | 41 Laboratory and Measuring > 11 Measuring Instruments > 25 Liquid and Gas Flow > 01 Flowmeters |
| **Confidence** | 92% [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| **Custom Product Group** | None — UNSPSC match is strong |

sections.title: Commodity Functional Promise
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Commodity or Group** | Flowmeters (UNSPSC 41112501) |
| **Functional Promise** | Quantify the volumetric or mass flow rate of fluids traversing a closed conduit |
| **Scope** | commodity |
| **Reasoning** | All flowmeter technologies (ultrasonic, Coriolis, electromagnetic, turbine, vortex, orifice-plate, thermal, differential-pressure) share this fundamental function. Differences are in mechanism, accuracy, media compatibility, and installation constraints — not in function. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |

sections.title: FP Extension (Broader-than-UNSPSC Capabilities)
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Primary Commodity FP** | Quantify the volumetric or mass flow rate of fluids traversing a closed conduit |
| **FP Extension** | The underlying transit-time ultrasonic principle also enables: (1) liquid concentration measurement — glycol percentage detection via speed-of-sound shifts; (2) medium anomaly detection — air bubble presence, empty-pipe conditions; (3) fluid temperature monitoring — via integrated thermistor. These cross into UNSPSC classes 41115600 (Liquid analyzers) and 41112201 (Temperature sensors). [ASM: derived from feature set in 01_product_decomposition] |
| **Extension Domains** | Liquid composition analysis, process anomaly detection, thermal monitoring |
| **Market Discovery Use** | Phase A secondary search: "What industries need real-time detection of liquid composition anomalies in closed-pipe systems?" |

**Justification for Extension:** The Marquardt sensor's feature set (Digital Anomaly Detection, Integrated Temperature Sensing) delivers capabilities beyond pure flow measurement. The glycol-concentration detection and bubble/empty-pipe diagnostics are not flowmeter functions — they are process analytics functions that happen to be co-located in the same sensor body. This broadens the addressable market beyond traditional flowmeter buyers. [ASM]

sections.title: VN / BOM Position
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **BOM Level** | L5 — Component [ASM] |
| **Position** | Sensor/transducer within a fluid-handling subsystem |
| **Parent Subsystem (typical)** | Hydronic circuit, cooling loop, heating circuit, process-fluid loop |
| **Grandparent System (typical)** | HVAC system, heat pump, boiler, industrial process skid, beverage dispenser |
| **Promise Scope Impact** | Component-level FP is narrow: "measure flow + temperature at one point." The subsystem-level promise would be broader: "regulate thermal energy transfer." The FP as stated is correctly scoped to the component level. [ASM] |

sections.title: Required Complements
sections.content:
| # | Complement | Criticality | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Fluid conduit / piping** | Essential | Sensor must be installed inline in a pipe of matching diameter (DN12–DN25). Without piping, no measurement is possible. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 2 | **System controller** | Essential | Microcontroller, PLC, or building management system to read sensor output (UART / LIN / frequency) and act on data. Sensor produces raw signals, not decisions. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 3 | **DC power supply** | Essential | 5V or 6–30V DC depending on variant. Battery mode available at <5 uA for remote installations but requires battery infrastructure. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 4 | **Straight pipe run (upstream)** | Essential | 5–10x DN of undisturbed straight pipe upstream required for specified accuracy. Elbows, valves, or tees upstream degrade measurement. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 5 | **De-aerator (in air-prone circuits)** | Enhancing | Systems with chronic air entrainment >2% vol require upstream de-aeration for reliable measurement. Not needed in well-designed closed circuits. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 6 | **Commissioning / fluid-type configuration** | Enhancing | Fluid type must be configured at commissioning for accurate compensation algorithms. Pre-calibration by Marquardt reduces this burden. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] |
| 7 | **Data logging / visualization** | Optional | SCADA, HMI, or cloud dashboard to store and display measurement trends. Not required for basic control-loop operation. [ASM] |

---

sections.title: How This Feeds Downstream
sections.content:
| Phase | Uses | Search Query |
|---|---|---|
| **A: NAICS Discovery (primary)** | Commodity FP | "What industries need to quantify the volumetric or mass flow rate of fluids traversing a closed conduit?" |
| **A: NAICS Discovery (secondary)** | FP Extension | "What industries need real-time detection of liquid composition anomalies in closed-pipe systems?" |
| **B: Architecture Distance** | Product FP + specs | "How close is this market's use case to measuring flow rate and temperature in closed-pipe liquid circuits without contact, pressure drop, or moving parts?" |

---

sections.title: QA Checklist
sections.content:
| # | Check | Result |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Product FP present with statement, verb, object, context, differentiators | PASS |
| 2 | Product FP passes mechanism-free test | PASS — no technology-specific terms |
| 3 | Commodity FP present and vendor-agnostic | PASS — no brand/product names |
| 4 | UNSPSC commodity code or custom product group identified | PASS — 41112501 Flowmeters |
| 5 | VN / BOM position mapped | PASS — L5 Component |
| 6 | Required complements listed with criticality | PASS — 7 complements (4 Essential, 2 Enhancing, 1 Optional) |
| 7 | Source tags on all factual claims | PASS — [SRC], [EST], [ASM] applied |
| 8 | FP Extension assessed | PASS — present (capability broader than UNSPSC: liquid analysis + anomaly detection) |

---
